relationships.summary: Apache-2.0 is an example of a permissive open source license.
The license policy supports the Apache-2.0 implementation artifact claim.
The canonical pack bootstrap created the first bundled pack revision.
Built By Bots created the XanaNode icon asset.
CC-BY 4.0 is an attribution license.
CC-BY 4.0 requires attribution to the XanaNode contributors for protocol documentation reuse.
CC0 is an open public-domain dedication pattern.
Christian Siefen authored the canonical XanaNode substrate identity.
XanaNode schemas, validators, and reference code are licensed under Apache-2.0.
The implementation compatibility spec supports the compatibility identification claim.
The implementation compatibility spec defines compatibility attribution.
Core builds and validates the protocol artifacts consumed by projections and workspaces.
The public Core SDK repository documents the Core SDK project.
Core is a renderer-independent implementation of the XanaNode protocol.
Core currently uses Node.js for the JavaScript SDK and CLI.
The license policy supports the documentation license claim.
The GitHub profile includes the public Core SDK repository.
The GitHub profile includes the public Hugo projection repository.
The GitHub profile includes the public protocol repository.
GPL-3.0 is a software license included for comparison.
The public Hugo repository documents the Hugo projection project.
The XanaNode Hugo theme is one static website implementation of a substrate projection layer.
The Hugo projection uses Core rather than owning protocol validation logic.
The XanaNode Hugo projection uses Cytoscape.js for interactive graph rendering.
The XanaNode Hugo projection uses Hugo as its static site generator.
The XanaNode icon depicts the XanaNode concept and project identity.
The XanaNode license policy defines the project licensing split.
Licensing defines the open license concept.
MIT is an example of a permissive open source license.
The NOTICE file documents XanaNode licensing and trademark attribution.
Open licensing includes content license patterns.
Open licensing includes software license patterns.

XanaNode Protocol publishes the web manifest for projection branding.

XanaNode Protocol publishes XanaNode Apple Touch Icon as a bundled branding asset.

XanaNode Protocol publishes XanaNode Favicon ICO as a bundled branding asset.
The protocol artifact layer addresses the friction of recreating validated nodes as Markdown.
